remaining_params.StackDescription: {p:You} creates a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Cast this spell only during combat. Create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.

params.Description: If you control a Plains, you may tap an untapped creature you control rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
